blogs.name: Goldman Sachs Insights - Articles
blogs.notes: Google News RSS as discovery feed. Fetches full article from GS site.

blogs.name: BlackRock Investment Institute
blogs.notes: Google News RSS as discovery feed. Weekly commentary, annual outlook, mega forces research. No native RSS.

blogs.name: JPMorgan Asset Management - Market Insights
blogs.notes: AEM JSON endpoint — am.jpmorgan.com not indexed by Google News. Parses hidden model.json with pages[] array (title, description, displayDate, url).

blogs.name: Federal Reserve — Research & Notes
blogs.notes: Google News RSS. FEDS Notes, Finance & Economics Discussion Series, working papers. Native feed /feeds/research.xml è 404 — Google News usato come fallback.

blogs.name: ECB — Research & Publications
blogs.notes: Google News RSS. ECB Research Bulletin, Economic Bulletin, working papers. Essential for European advisors.

blogs.name: PIMCO — Insights
blogs.notes: Google News RSS. Fixed income research, macro outlook, Secular Outlook, Investment Committee views. No native RSS confirmed.

blogs.name: Morgan Stanley Investment Management — Insights
blogs.notes: Google News RSS. Market outlooks, fund commentaries, secular themes.
